description: Use this API to purge specified harmonics FACTS device data from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_facts_purg(name,sendbus,termbus)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Facts device name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sendbus
parameters.description: Facts device sending bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: termbus
parameters.description: Facts device terminal bus number. (input; 0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
